text: Flying High Pet Resort is where all dogs fly first class. We are located in Camarillo, California.
Grooming is all about a spa day for your dog. You get to come in, your dog can have a blueberry
facial. We take a lot of care of when even when we put them on our table, we don't always strap
them up because we're always there taking care of them, massaging them, rubbing them, spending a lot
of time with them, making them feel comfortable throughout the experience. We're a cage-free
environment so they get to hang out on the floor when they're not in the middle of being groomed.
We hand dry, we don't cage dry. All of this is so that we can actually have our hands on the
dogs the whole time, make sure they're not, you know, overheating in a dryer. There's a lot of
special care we take when we do grooming. I love that we are a family-owned business. We know each
dog by name. We take great care to learn their personality. We foster and rescue dogs. We
absolutely love to help them. We have a lot of good friends that are in the community. We have
We love doing that. It's our way of giving back to the community.
We welcome all Ventura County residents.
There's a special for new customers. Go ahead and click the link below.
